---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for SiraGPT
title: "[FEATURE] <short description>"
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?
(_e.g. "As a power user, I want X so that Y."_)

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why you rejected them.

## Scope

- [ ] Frontend (Next.js / UI)
- [ ] Backend (Express / agents / pipelines)
- [ ] Visual tools
- [ ] Document pipeline
- [ ] Research agent / scientific search
- [ ] Infra / CI / observability
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:

## Acceptance criteria

How will we know this feature is done?

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...
- [ ] Tests added
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Additional context

Mockups, references, links to related issues / PRs, etc.
